basic_data.human_name: Let's Go Gambling!...aw dang it.
basic_data.detailed_marketing_blurb:
Spin the wheel, chuck the dice, and win big in our latest bundle focused on tipping the odds in your favor. Combine strategy and chaos as best you can while you navigate through Dicealot’s risky engagements, build multiple winning hands in This Ain’t Even Poker, Ya Joker, or even alter probability itself in Pip My Dice. These tempting tales, plus five more await you, and you’ll be supporting Movember with your purchase.

Keys expire. Please redeem before July 22nd, 2027.
basic_data.description:
Put it all on 23, baby! Spin the wheel, chuck the dice, and win big in our latest bundle focused on tipping the odds in your favor. Combine strategy and chaos as best you can while you navigate through Dicealot’s risky engagements, build multiple winning hands in This Ain’t Even Poker, Ya Joker, or even alter probability itself in Pip My Dice. These tempting tales, plus five more await you, and you’ll be supporting Movember with your purchase.

Keys expire. Please redeem before July 22nd, 2027.

Pay $7 or more. Normally, the total cost for the games in this bundle is as much as $71. Here at Humble Bundle, you choose the price and increase your contribution to upgrade your bundle! This bundle has a minimum $7 purchase. Pay $7 or more to access Steam keys.

Redeem on Steam. All of the games in this bundle are available on Steam for Windows — and some for Mac and Linux too. Please review the system requirements here.

Support charity. Choose where the money goes - between the publishers and to support Movember. If you like what we do, you can leave us a Humble Tip too!

diceydungeons.callout: Become a giant walking dice, explore dungeons and defy Lady Luck in this dice powered roguelike! Now featuring "Reunion", a free DLC with six brand-new episodes!
diceydungeons.description_text:
Become a giant walking dice and battle to the end of an ever-changing dungeon! Can you escape the cruel whims of Lady Luck? Now featuring ""Dicey Dungeons: Reunion"", a free DLC with six brand-new episodes! (Check out the Reunion OST on Bandcamp!) In this fast-paced deckbuilding roguelike from Terry Cavanagh (Super Hexagon, VVVVVV), Chipzel, and Marlowe Dobbe, you'll fight monsters, find better loot, level up your heroes, and maybe even take down the Goddess of Fortune, Lady Luck herself. Balance your carefully planned strategies against the unknown of a dice roll.

MEET THE CONTESTANTS

Play as six different characters, each with their own unique play styles and abilities.

  • The Thief, who steals random enemy equipment every turn!
  • The Robot, who gains dice by playing a push-your-luck blackjack game!
  • The Inventor, overcome with inspiration, who must destroy their own equipment after each fight to get parts for powerful new gadgets!
  • and more!

Master each class and figure out which one best fits your style in this charming world filled with a growing array of twists and secrets. Can you make it out alive? Maybe, but luck is definitely not on your side.

FEATURES

  • Six wildly different playable classes: Warrior, Thief, Robot, Jester, Inventor and Witch.
  • Dozens of enemies, ranging from Vacuum Cleaners that want to suck your blood, to creatures from Irish mythology, to suave malevolent snowmen.
  • A catchy, upbeat and energetic soundtrack by Chipzel (previously, the musician from Super Hexagon).
  • Beautiful and adorable artwork by Marlowe Dobbe.
  • Procedurally generated for endless play-throughs.

pipmydice.callout: Pip My Dice is a Yahtzee Roguelike experience. Score enough to make it to the next level, customize your dice to score more and collect relics to create unlimited combos!
pipmydice.description_text:
About the game

Pip My Dice is a roguelike deck builder inspired by Balatro and the Yahtzee game. Customize different dice and use them together with powerful relics to break high scores and climb the leaderboard. 

Collect powerful relics to create synergies with your dice and upgrade your combination slots. Take your time and make wise decisions about what you buy in the shop and how you use it. Don't be greedy, you never know if you are going to roll what you are expecting... Unless you customize your dice so much that all faces are the same!

Enjoy endless replayability with the guarantee that every run will be different from the previous one, and save your favorite seeds to replay and share those you like the most.

Customize all faces of your dice individually to make the most of your relics and create game-breaking combos! Rig the odds by modifying the value of the dice faces, and make sure that there is no room for chance. Hold on to precious consumables to get you out of trouble.

Features

  • 130 Relics to create various builds and synergies with your dice

  • Climb the leaderboard with seeded or random runs to compete with the world or your friends!

  • Select from 15+ different starting dice cups

  • 50+ Different dice modifiers with unique effects

  • 20+ Different bosses to defeat

  • Daily runs

  • Stats and Run History

  • 25 Consumables to give you some extra help when you need it the most

  • Level up your combination slots as the run goes on

treasuretiger.callout: You’ve got five nights to strike it rich and save your future. All you have to do is spin, survive, and keep the windows shut.
treasuretiger.description_text:
Treasure Tiger — A Deadly Game of Luck While your wife is away on a trip, you stumble across a mysterious betting app that promises instant riches — all from the comfort of your home. Desperate for a way out of financial ruin, you start spinning. But this game isn’t just about money. It’s about survival. Treasure Tiger is a first-person horror game where every spin brings you closer to fortune… or to something far worse.

Spin to Survive

Your only tool is your phone — and the cursed roulette app installed on it. Use the mouse to spin and earn cash through randomized outcomes:

  • Double or nothing
  • Partial refunds
  • Complete losses
  • Sudden anomalies in your environment

Each result affects your surroundings. Power outages. Sudden darkness. Unnatural sounds. And the Tiger… getting closer.

Keep Treasure Tiger Out

As the nights go on, the odds become increasingly stacked against you. A sinister creature known only as Treasure Tiger begins to appear — tapping at windows, lurking in shadows, and waiting for a chance to strike. You'll need to:

  • Monitor your environment carefully
  • Close windows quickly using the E key
  • Conserve flashlight power
  • React fast when danger hits
  • Fail, and he’ll enter your home. Game over.

 

Five Nights. One Shot at Salvation.

The game unfolds across five increasingly intense nights. Each night escalates the tension with new challenges, harder odds, and deeper revelations. Clues begin to appear — messages on walls, distorted phone calls, and strange figures in the dark. What starts as a gambling app slowly reveals a much darker truth.

Key Features:

  • A unique blend of gambling mechanics and survival horror
  • First-person gameplay
  • Dynamic environment changes based on spin results
  • Reactive AI: Treasure Tiger adapts to your behavior
  • Atmospheric storytelling with escalating psychological horror
  • Multiple endings depending on your performance
  • Short-session design — easy to pick up, hard to master

Will you get rich — or get devoured? Treasure Tiger is watching.

thisaintevenpokeryajoker.human_name: This Ain't Even Poker, Ya Joker
thisaintevenpokeryajoker.callout: A unique incremental idle clicker where you flip cards to earn money, grow your hand, buy new decks, unlock powerful upgrades, discover new cards, and more.
thisaintevenpokeryajoker.description_text:
GROW YOUR HAND

Buy new cards to increase your odds of hitting good hands. If you're rich enough, you can even break the rules and get over 5 cards.

GO ON EXPEDITIONS

Once unlocked, you can send your minions on expeditions to discover new otherworldy cards with powerful benefits. Upgrade these missions to provide even more powerful benefits as you progress. You can even unlock missions to destroy cards from your deck that you don't want, to ensure every hand is exactly how you want it.

GET UPGRADED

Buy powerful upgrades using your hard earned coins, enabling you to progress quicker, open up new avenues, and take on the evil Jester!

ESTABLISH DOMINANCE

Even though the Jester doesn't like it, you can buy new decks of cards in order to play more hands at once. Use this to your advantage to grow those numbers even faster!

ASCEND TO GREATNESS

Make a deal with Mary the Fairy to start over in exchange for Poker Chips (poker chips? ...but this ain't even poker...?), use those chips to buy even more powerful upgrades.

ESCAPE THE HOUSE OF CARDS

You're trapped in the Jester's domain, can you manage to defeat him and escape? Or will he keep you there, trapped forever in an endless cycle?

explosiveodds.callout: Gamble with your life in this explosive PvP game for 2-4 players. Cut wires, earn cash, use abilities and avoid the detonators. Test your luck, skills and remember to always bet on the boom!
explosiveodds.description_text:
Be the last bot sitting in head to head matches with 2-4 players.

Experience tense PvP matches with 2, 3 or 4 players. Defuse a bomb with your friends and be the last bot sitting to win big! Use emotes, gestures, and in game voice comms to rub it in when their head explodes.

Clear wires to get cash, the richest player at the end of the 3 rounds wins!

The BombSlot device houses 3 wheels with 8 wires each. On your turn choose and cut one wire. Cutting a wire can earn you cash, abilities or, if your unlucky, detonate.

 Use a variety of abilities to gain an edge over chance.

  • Scan - to narrow down which wires may be detonators.

  • Spin - each wheel to a new random position.

  • Skip - your turn, sometimes its best to let another player cut a suspicious looking wire.

  • Reverse - the turn order and send it right back to the previous bot.

  • Lock - to limit another players choice to just one wheel.

  • Overload - the bomb to make the next player cut an additional wire (Yes it stacks!).

  • Turn, Detect, Plant, Obscure, And more!

 And more!

  • Auctions!

  • Minigames!

  • Face drawing!

  • Customizable match settings!

  • And more!

diceofkalma.callout: Build a deck of deathly skulls, find powerful synergies, and turn the dice to your favor to escape back to the world of the living.
diceofkalma.description_text:
WELCOME TO THE UNDERWORLD'S DEADLIEST GAME OF DICE POKER! Dice of Kalma is an unholy deckbuilding roguelike game where every roll matters. Collect game-breaking skulls, play poker-style dice hands, and challenge the grim guardian of the Underworld. How far can you push your luck to master the chaos?

 BUILD POKER HANDS TO SCORE POINTS

  • Collect skulls that transform bad rolls into game breaking combos

  • Upgrade your favorite poker hands for massive multipliers

  • Push your luck or play it safe, the choice is yours

 BUILD A DECK OF SKULLS

  • 70+ unique skulls with game-breaking abilities 

  • 8 upgradeable poker hands

  • Dark, atmospheric pixel art

  • Endless replayability

  • Leaderboards and achievements

NUMBERS GO UP

Activate as many skulls as possible with every hand and use your rerolls to gain every advantage you can. Upgrade chosen poker hands to increase their value and complement your deck of skulls to meet increasingly difficult challenges.

FAIL AND TRY AGAIN

If you run out of hands, it is game over for you. Don’t worry, though. Persistence is rewarded, and the guardian of the Underworld seems to grow fond of you coming back to challenge him for just one more round.

movember.description_text:
Payments to The Movember Foundation are made via the PayPal Giving Fund.

Movember is the leading charity changing the face of men’s health on a global scale, focusing on mental health and suicide prevention, prostate cancer and testicular cancer.

The charity raises funds to deliver innovative, breakthrough research and support programmes that enable men to live happier, healthier and longer lives. In addition to tackling key health issues faced by men, Movember is working to encourage men to stay healthy in all areas of their life, with a focus on men staying socially connected and becoming more open to discussing their health and significant moments in their lives.

dicealtot.callout: Discover a high-stakes roguelike dice-builder where every roll is a risk, every risk is a thrill, and every thrill teeters between triumph and disaster.
dicealtot.description_text:
Every roll is a risk. Every risk is a thrill.

Dicealot is a high-stakes roguelike dice-builder where every roll is a risk, every risk is a thrill, and every thrill teeters between triumph and disaster. Roll in search of devastating strikes, gamble in the hunt for nail-biting payoffs, and push your luck to its very limits as you battle to conquer your foes.

Set in the charmingly chaotic realm of Camelot, chance collides with strategy, mastery dances with madness, and one single roll can rewrite your fate. The twist? Keep rolling to stack bigger combos and score more points, but push too far, and you’ll lose everything you’ve gained that turn.

Every roll matters. Every choice could be your last. Do you dare to keep rolling when the Kingdom itself hangs in the balance?

Your Dice. Your Strategy. Your Skill.

You’ll begin each run with a simple set of dice, but between battles you’ll stop at shops to expand and refine your collection. Some dice tilt the odds in your favour, others amplify your scores, and a few can backfire entirely, unless you’ve saved enough re-rolls to turn the tide. It’s up to you to experiment and discover the perfect combinations to save King Arthur and smite his foes!

Wield one of 10 distinct weapons that fundamentally transform the way you play. Maybe you favour steady, smaller, but consistent hits, or perhaps you thrive on the thrill of chasing the biggest rolls? Every choice unlocks a unique playstyle and demands a new strategy, putting your fate in your own hands as you forge your path to victory.

Master the Madness to Save the King.

A strange and sinister fate has befallen King Arthur, cursed by a spell that threatens all of Camelot. Now Queen Guinevere must rally the loyal Knights of the Round Table and lead them through a medieval kingdom that’s both charmingly unhinged and dangerously unpredictable.

Master the mayhem on your own terms in this roguelike, where Farkle-inspired combat meets deck-building depth. Every decision you make will shape your fate, and victory belongs to those bold enough to embrace the chaos and risk it all for the perfect combination.

Key Features:

  • High-risk, high-reward, high-stakes gameplay, where every decision matters

  • 100+ unique dice to encounter for progressive dice-building

  • 10 distinct weapons with their own unique abilities to tweak your playstyle

  • 30+ wicked foes for you to take on within the chaotic Camelot realm

  • 7 difficulty levels for endless replayability and to test your mettle

Push-your-luck Farkle-inspired combat will keep you on the edge of your seat

Push Your Luck, Hold Your Nerve, Save the Kingdom.

Face over 30 eclectic enemies, each with varied abilities and unique dice that will test your dice-building skills and strategy. From irate maidens to mystical creatures, your journey will be challenged at every turn. Will you persevere and save your King? Do you have the nerve to keep rolling when everything's on the line?

Push your luck! Master the Madness! Hold Your Nerve! Save the Kingdom!

Wishlist Dicealot now to be the first to roll into the kingdom.

 Inspirations

Fans of Balatro, Monster Train, Slay the Spire, Inscryption, and Dicey Dungeons will feel right at home - with a dice-driven twist that’s all Dicealot’s own.

supertaxcity.callout: Choose and place your favorite facilities from randomly drawn options! The combinations are endless! Create a profitable city that's uniquely yours!
supertaxcity.description_text:
A new sensation!? City-building × Roguelike game *Super Tax City*.

Choose and place your favorite facilities from randomly drawn options!

The combinations are endless! Create a profitable city that's uniquely yours!

Rules

Choose a facility from three options and place it on the map!

When randomly moving residents enter a facility, they perform tasks and earn rewards!

When the time limit expires, it's tax time.

Pay your taxes with the money you've earned!

 

About the Facilities

Over 100 types of unique facilities with distinctive effects are featured!

 

About the items

Enhance your city even further with over 100 different items!

The combinations are endless!

Create a profitable city that's uniquely yours!

 

Streaming Guidelines

1) You are free to stream and upload gameplay videos without prior notice, regardless of whether you are an individual or corporation, and regardless of whether your activities are for profit or not.

2) If possible, please include the URL of the Steam page in the description.

3) We take no responsibility for any damages that may occur as a result of streaming this game. Additionally, the content of these guidelines may be changed without prior notice.

sideeffects.description_text:
Up to four test subjects. One twisted medical trial. Only one leaves.

Welcome to Side Effects: a tense, turn-based medical roulette game. Each round you'll be presented with a selection of pills. Some are helpful, some are harmful, and some mean instant death. You never know what you're about to consume or what it might do to your mind or body. Winning means outlasting – AKA, outliving – your opponent across the table.

Resist

Every pill impacts your resistance. Manage it wisely: zero resistance means death.

Experiment

Between rounds, you can choose from a range of experimental items and treatments that can shift the odds in your favor, from vaccines to mouth clamps.

You’re not alone

The other patient wants to outlast you. They’ll bluff, adapt, and use everything at their disposal to keep breathing one dose longer than you.

movember.description_text:
Payments to The Movember Foundation are made via the PayPal Giving Fund.

Movember is the leading charity changing the face of men’s health on a global scale, focusing on mental health and suicide prevention, prostate cancer and testicular cancer.

The charity raises funds to deliver innovative, breakthrough research and support programmes that enable men to live happier, healthier and longer lives. In addition to tackling key health issues faced by men, Movember is working to encourage men to stay healthy in all areas of their life, with a focus on men staying socially connected and becoming more open to discussing their health and significant moments in their lives.

from_bundle.tile_short_name: Let's Go Gambling!...aw dang it.
from_bundle.marketing_blurb: Get Dicealot, Pip My Dice, SuperTaxCity, This Ain't Even Poker, Ya Joker, and more!
from_bundle.detailed_marketing_blurb:
Spin the wheel, chuck the dice, and win big in our latest bundle focused on tipping the odds in your favor. Combine strategy and chaos as best you can while you navigate through Dicealot’s risky engagements, build multiple winning hands in This Ain’t Even Poker, Ya Joker, or even alter probability itself in Pip My Dice. These tempting tales, plus five more await you, and you’ll be supporting Movember with your purchase.

Keys expire. Please redeem before July 22nd, 2027.
from_bundle.author: Publishers

basic_data.human_name: Humble Book Bundle: Craft Your Cosplay Dreams
basic_data.detailed_marketing_blurb: With this bundle of how-to books on crafting the perfect cosplay, you have everything you need to turn yourself into the main character! Or the charming sidekick. Or the character nobody understands better than you. Try your hand at blacksmithing without all the fuss and craft the swords, shields, and armor of your wildest imagination. Collect patterns for masks, ears, pouches, and witch hats. Learn the ins and outs of 3D printing, cosplay as a business, and how to give your photos the aura they deserve. There’s a lot more included in the pages of this bundle, so get it now at the price of your choice, and choose your own charity to support with your purchase!
basic_data.description:
Give yourself main character energy. With this bundle of how-to books on crafting the perfect cosplay, you have everything you need to turn yourself into the main character! Or the charming sidekick. Or the character nobody understands better than you. Try your hand at blacksmithing without all the fuss and craft the swords, shields, and armor of your wildest imagination. Collect patterns for masks, ears, pouches, and witch hats. Learn the ins and outs of 3D printing, cosplay as a business, and how to give your photos the aura they deserve. There’s a lot more included in the pages of this bundle, so get it now at the price of your choice, and choose your own charity to support with your purchase!

Pay $18 or more. Normally, the total cost for the ebooks in this bundle is as much as $767. Here at Humble Bundle, you choose the price and increase your contribution to upgrade your bundle! This bundle has a minimum $18 purchase.

Read them anywhere. The ebooks in this bundle are available in PDF, and ePub formats, so they work on your computer, e-readers, iPads, cell phones, and a wide array of mobile devices! Instructions and a list of recommended reading programs can be found here.

Support charity. Choose where the money goes - between the publishers and to support a charity of your choice. If you like what we do, you can leave us a Humble Tip too!

make_propsandcostumearmor.description_text:
Have you been trying to think of a way to conquer your local comic convention through cosplay? Do you gaze with envious eyes upon the fan-made suits of armored awesomeness strolling around every year on Halloween? Do you have a spot on your wall, bookshelf, or desk that desperately needs to be filled with a screen-accurate replica of your favorite science-fiction or fantasy weapon? If so, look no further. We've got just the book for you!

In this book, master prop maker Shawn Thorsson uses his unique blend of humor and insight to turn years of painful experience into detailed explanations. He'll show you many of the tools, methods, and processes that you can use to create professional-looking science fiction and fantasy props and armor. The ultimate collision of creative imagination and practical maker skills, making props and costume armor involves sculpting, molding, casting, 3D printing, CNC fabrication, painting, and countless other techniques and technologies.

In this book, you'll learn:

  • Basic fabrication methods using inexpensive, commonly-available tools and materials
  • Simple, low-cost methods to make foam armor out of easy-to-find foam mats
  • How to use the popular Pepakura software to build 3D models with paper
  • Multiple molding and casting techniques
  • How to build a "vacuforming" machine to make armor from plastic sheet stock
  • Painting and weathering techniques that will bring your props to life
  • Just enough safety advice to keep you from losing body parts along the way

Whether you're just a beginner or a seasoned builder with countless projects behind you, this book is sure to be an invaluable addition to your workshop library.

abeginnersguidetospecialmakeupeffects_mo.human_name: A Beginner's Guide to Special Makeup Effects: Monsters, Maniacs and More
abeginnersguidetospecialmakeupeffects_mo.description_text:
A Beginner's Guide to Special Makeup Effects: Monsters, Maniacs and More is an introduction to special effects makeup using cost-effective tools and materials that can be found in local stores.

The book is divided into three sections – Simple Makeup, Advanced Materials and Techniques and Advanced Makeup – and features tutorials to create characters such as a pirate, vampire, ghost, robot, burn victim, witch, zombie and goblin. Each character is introduced with a full-page photograph of the finished makeup and illustrated with full-color, step-by-step photographs. The book also includes instructions on how to make fake teeth, apply bald caps, create gory wounds and injuries and make simple prosthetics. Each makeup tutorial is designed to progressively build on the techniques outlined in the preceding tutorial, guiding readers from the basics of foundation, highlight and shadow to creating advanced creature makeups.

This is a beginner makeup book suited for students of Stage Makeup courses, as well as for the theatre technician working and training on their own.

handsewingmagic.description_text:
?Hand Sewing Magic is an essential reference for all things stitching, including how-tos for dozens of stitches, sewing and mending basics, stunning embroidered embellishments, and fun, creative projects. Discover the pleasures of slow stitching as Lynn Krawczyk shows you how to enjoy the meditative and mindful process of stitching by hand. Stitching and embroidery are great ways to add color, texture, and interest to all kinds of textiles, and you’ll see how easy it is to develop a distinctive style. After mastering a variety of stitches, apply them to imaginative projects, such as a boro sketchbook cover, a stuffed toy bunny, a wabi sabi neck scarf, and an embroidered square bowl. Even experienced sewers and embroiderers will learn how to transfer patterns, ideas for organizing and caring for thread, differences in thread types, and great troubleshooting tips.

Hand Sewing Magic is a modern, all-in-one guide for hand stitchers of all levels of skill and experience, and for all applications.In this unique guide book you will:

  • Get an in-depth overview of essential tools and materials, including thread, needles, fabric, and other key supplies.
  • Explore a comprehensive visual dictionary of 35 stitches, plus dozens of variations, including basic mending, stylish decorative embellishments, and unique art stitching.
  • Discover key techniques, such as starting and ending threads, the correct way to use an embroidery hoop, stitching curved shapes, color shading, and more.
  • Gain confidence in your stitching and embroidery skills as you try new techniques.
  • Learn essential tips and tricks from influential and innovative stitchers, including Joanne Sharpe, Allison Aller, and Catherine Redford.
  • Use stitches and techniques in unique ways for 10 simple and stunning projects. 
With Hand Sewing Magic, you’ll make the most of your hand stitching and give all your projects a beautiful handmade look.

firsttimesewingwithaserger.human_name: First Time Sewing with a Serger
firsttimesewingwithaserger.description_text: In First Time Sewing with a Serger, sewing experts Becky Hanson and Beth Baumgartel take you by the hand and teach you everything you need to know to sew with a serger, or overlock machine—a versatile and speedy stitching tool. Start by learning how a serger works, the many styles available, and the roles of various parts and accessories. Get a detailed overview of the variety of functional and decorative stitches you can make, plus must-have threads, tools, and notions. Next, familiarize yourself with how to thread your serger, set the stitch size, and use it to start and end seams, sew curves and corners, and more. You'll use these essential skills to make the nine fun, easy garment and home decor projects--skills you'll turn to again and again to create your own professional-looking pieces!

shieldpatterncollection.description_text: This Shield Pattern Collection comes with 4 different designs including a round shield, a simple shield, a knight shield and a viking shield. These are vector files that can easily be rescaled to any desired size. Scroll down a bit to find a video on how to put the patterns together. All shields include instructions on how to put them together as well as a sizing chart.

earsandtailsforcosplay.description_text:
Welcome to the wonderful world of crafting ears and tails! Whether you’re a seasoned cat girl or just getting started with crafting this book will help expand your skills and take your creations to the next level.

From the very basics, showing fundamental tools, skills, and techniques for working with fur, all the way to more advanced crafting with tutorials and examples for different styles of ears and tails! By the end of this book, you will be a master of all things cute and fluffy!

femalebreastplatepatterncollection.description_text: Want to build cool breastplates for your costumes? Easy! Use these handy patterns to get started! This collection includes a sexy breastplate, a bikini breastplate, a full corset breastplate, a sci-fi breastplate and a fully-closed breastplate! All patterns are based on size EU 38/40 and US 8/10 but can be easily altered to smaller or larger sizes! Just print them out on any home printer, trace all pieces to foam (or any other material) and glue them together! It’s super fun!

firsttimegarmentfitting.description_text: In First Time Garment Fitting, sewing and design expert Sarah Veblen takes you by the hand and teaches you everything you need to know to adapt patterns so you can sew garments that fit just right. With detailed descriptions of essential tools and techniques, the easy step-by-step instructions will have you altering patterns and sewing tops, pants, and skirts that fit you to a T in no time. The projects introduce key skills you’ll use again and again for all your garment sewing. With First Time Garment Fitting, you’ll soon be sewing amazing clothing with confidence.

newlightsanimatedledsforbeginner.human_name: New Lights | Animated LEDs for Beginner
newlightsanimatedledsforbeginner.description_text:
This book is aimed at costume enthusiasts, craftsmen, hobby elves, Cosplayers and everyone who wanted to be a mythical creature at some point. Over the last two years, I have done a lot of fiddling and experimenting with new methods, mostly concerning new ways on how to make horns and antlers. Two of them are shown in this book, with over 200 new pictures, step-by-step tutorials and a lot of helpful tips.

– over 200 new pictures

– 84 pages

– Step by step tutorial

– Headdress base

– Kobracast antler tutorial

– Worblas finest Art Horns

– Attach horns on a wig

– Painting tips

– Informations about the materials

bookoftexturemaking2.description_text:
You already started bringing your cosplays to life, but want to take your textures to the next level? Then this Ebook is for you!

“The Book of Texture Making – Volume 2” is the continuation of the first volume and dives deeper into advanced techniques for creating even more realistic and detailed textures from EVA Foam and Worbla. If you already know the basics or have worked with Volume 1, this book will expand your skills and push your craftsmanship further.

With new textures, additional techniques, and extended knowledge, you will discover even more possibilities to elevate your cosplay projects. This volume also includes exclusive video tutorials to guide you step by step through selected processes and help you refine your workflow.

Take your creativity further and unlock new levels of detail and realism!

By the way, this book can also be used for various artistic fields such as diorama building, miniature painting, or scenography.

femininearmorpatternset.description_text:
This pattern is for a full set of feminine armor which can be made from EVA foam! It includes pieces for the breastplate, shoulders, arms, hips, thighs, knees, legs and toes!

This set is a perfect starting point which you can add to and alter to create your armored costumes!

malebreastplatepatterncollection2.description_text: Want to build cool breastplates for your costumes? Easy! Use these handy patterns to get started! This collection includes a Chest Armor, Paladin Breastplate, Short Breastplate and a Roman Breastplate. All patterns are based on my a male bodies size 1.88cm (6.2ft) height, 83kg (182lbs), 102cm (40.1inch) breast circumference) but can be easily altered to smaller or larger sizes by simply rescaling or editing!

fantasyleatherarmorbundle.description_text: This collection is an expansive pattern and tutorial pack that will teach you to craft a full head-to-toe suit of fantasy armor in a fantasy style (Includes a bonus variant style for alternate aesthetic). The complete video series is built to provide an apprenticeship crash course on both leather crafting and armor creation. New to the craft? Many first-time leather crafting students have taken on this challenge with great success!

pouchpatterncollection.description_text:
Need a pouch for your next cosplay or costume? Just grab any pouch pattern from this collection, print it out on paper, trace all parts to your favorite material, cut the pieces out and glue them together! I built my example pouch with 2mm EVA foam and added decorative stitches. You can also use different materials like faux or real leather. This Pouch Pattern Collection includes 9 different designs: Simple Pouch, Square Pouch, Flat Pouch, Draw String Pouch, Round Pouch, Wide Pouch, Oval Pouch, Coin Pouch and Phone Pouch.

All pouches also come with a sizing chart that tells you in what scale you need to print them out to get the size you want. Scroll down to see a tutorial video of how to set them together.

tailoring.description_text:
Tailoring is the complete photo guide to sewing jackets and coats.

Written by sewing professionals, this book teaches the trusted, proven methods for sewing tailored jackets with impeccable details and perfect fit. Written for the intermediate sewer who wants to move on to more challenging projects, this book ensures success with detailed, step-by-step instructions, more than 400 photos, in-depth discussions about products and how to use them.

Tailoring offers guidance for every aspect of tailoring a jacket:

  • Fitting and pattern alteration
  • Fabrics and tools
  • Interfacings
  • Interlinings
  • Seams and finishes
  • Hand stitches
  • Collars
  • Pressing
  • Topstitching
  • Shaping shoulders
  • Setting in sleeves
  • Sewing pockets
  • Vents, and
  • Making perfect buttonholes

completephotoguidetoperfectfitting.human_name: Complete Photo Guide to Perfect Fitting
completephotoguidetoperfectfitting.description_text:
The Complete Photo Guide to Perfect Fitting is the ultimate reference for fitting test garments and transferring accurate adjustments to patterns. No matter what size or shape you are, wearing garments that fit perfectly makes you look and feel better. Rather than making commonly accepted changes to a commercial pattern, the method presented in this guide focuses on the way a test garment fits the body. The fabric is manipulated to improve the fit, and then those specific changes are made to the pattern. The result: patterns that fit perfectly!

With The Complete Photo Guide to Perfect Fitting, you'll learn:

  • The importance of a fitting axis and how to use it during a fitting
  • How to recognize fitting issues, such as drag lines and folds
  • How to manipulate fabric to solve common and unusual fitting problems
  • How to transfer the fitting changes to your pattern easily
  • Basic pattern-making skills to ensure accurate alterations
See the fitting process from start to finish on basic garments, fitted on real people. Then follow fitting solutions on different body types. Hundreds of large color photos illustrate the techniques and concepts in simple step-by-step instructions. With these lessons, you will get the perfect fit for any body.

make_cosplayedition.description_text:
Cosplay is the perfect gateway to making. What better way to celebrate fantasy worlds than to role-play as your favorite characters and build versatile skills along the way! In the latest issue of Make: we show you how to use EVA foam to make realistic fake leather, weld together 3D prints for BIG armor builds, and use Bekonix's easy drag-and-drop timelines to program cosplay lights, motors, and audio. Then, take it further by conceptualizing your own original character from the ground up. Plus, star cosplayers share their favorite tools, techniques, and communities.

Includes 42 projects you can make:

  • Create a camera obscura to view the upcoming solar eclipse
  • Sew versatile squishy sensors
  • Build your own gadget geocache puzzle
  • Save big $$ with a DIY photo light meter
  • Track periods and the lunar calendar offline with an illuminating display
  • How to 3D print in metal
  • And much more!

wigstylingforcosplay.description_text: This tutorial booklet will help you learn about cosplay wigs and how to style them! From the absolute basics of wigs such as the tools, cutting, and spiking all the way up to more advanced styling like ponytail wigs, side-cuts, and making weird shapes with hair! This book goes over it all to help you ensure your wigs look their best!

ramhornspatterncollectionforevafoamplusg.human_name: Ram horns pattern collection for EVA foam + guides
ramhornspatterncollectionforevafoamplusg.description_text:
This is a printable collection of 5 foam patterns for ram horns with different shapes and sizes. Perfect for a cosplay, OC costume or just a fun one-day project.

You will receive:

- 10 Easy, ready-to-print .PDF A4 and US letter 1:1 scale patterns of all parts

- 5 full guides with construction instructions and full colour images demonstrating the process

- Tools and materials lists

- Information on printing, sizing etc.

foamswordpatterncollection.description_text: This Foam Sword Pattern Collection comes with 4 different designs including a basic sword, a pirate sword, a medieval sword and a ninja sword. These patterns come with material recommendations, simple crafting instructions and a short tutorial video. Just print out your favorite design, follow the guide and create an amazing sword just for fun or any costume you want to bring to life!

bookof3dprinting_modelingfinishingandmor.human_name: The Book of 3D Printing - Modeling, Finishing & More
bookof3dprinting_modelingfinishingandmor.description_text: 3D modeling and printing is an amazing way to create everything you want with a minimum of materials, tools and space! On 48 pages and over 230 images I’ll show you everything you need to get started: picking a printer, how to work with different 3D modeling programs and finally how to turn your 3D printed plastic into a stunning masterpiece for your next costume! You’ll also find guides on how to get a 3D scan of yourself, how to work with Pepakura and plenty of more useful step-by-step instructions and examples!

cosplayasabusiness_makemoneywithart.human_name: Cosplay as a Business - Make Money with Art
cosplayasabusiness_makemoneywithart.description_text: Are you dreaming of turning your hobby into a full-time business? Or maybe you just want to find a way to cover your material and cosplay costs while doing what you love! There are so many ways to make this happen – whether it’s through offering commissions, selling prints, guesting at conventions, building community support, or creating content. As a veteran with 20 years of experience, I’ll give you a deep dive into the industry side of cosplay! Let me show you how to get noticed and build a strong portfolio, find and negotiate with clients, and create a sustainable income stream with your art. Follow your dreams!

badassbraids.description_text:
Recreate the braids, buns, and twists of your favorite historical, sci-fi, and fantasy heroes and heroines with Badass Braids.

Step-by-step, illustrated instructions show you how to make the hairstyles from Game of Thrones, The Hunger Games, Star Trek, Star Wars, The Legend of Zelda, Vikings, The Lord of the Rings, and more.

Author Shannon Burns runs the hugely popular YouTube channel Silvousplaits, where she showcases DIY hair art that mimics the hairstyles of valiant men and women in the best historical, sci-fi, and fantasy shows and movies.

In Badass Braids, Shannon shows you how to transform your hair with hard-core braids, step by step. The book covers 45 different braids and styles from a full spectrum of fantasy worlds (and galaxies), from ancient adversaries and viking warriors to romantic renegades and sci-fi heroines.

With an introduction to the styling techniques for different kinds of basic braids, interviews with behind-the-scenes stylists and actors, and original styles inspired by fan-favorites, you will learn to recreate the hairstyles of:
  • Katniss Everdeen (The Hunger Games: Mockingjay)
  • Anne Boleyn (The Tudors)
  • The Norse king Ragnar Lothbrok (Vikings)
  • Daenerys Targaryen (Game of Thrones)
  • Diana Prince (Wonder Woman)
  • Lizzy Bennet (Pride and Prejudice)
  • And many more
Badass Braids is the perfect gift for geeky men and women of all ages!

make_electronics3rdedition.description_text: Make: Electronics explores the properties and applications of discrete components that are the fundamental building blocks of circuit design. Understanding resistors, capacitors, transistors, inductors, diodes, and integrated circuit chips is essential even when using microcontrollers. Make: Electronics teaches the fundamentals and also provides advice on the tools and supplies that are necessary. Component kits are available, specifically developed for the third edition.

hornsandheaddresses.description_text:
This book is aimed at costume enthusiasts, craftsmen, hobby elves, Cosplayers and everyone who wanted to be a mythical creature at some point. Over the last two years, I have done a lot of fiddling and experimenting with new methods, mostly concerning new ways on how to make horns and antlers. Two of them are shown in this book, with over 200 new pictures, step-by-step tutorials and a lot of helpful tips.

– over 200 new pictures

– 84 pages

– Step by step tutorial

– Headdress base

– Kobracast antler tutorial

– Worblas finest Art Horns

– Attach horns on a wig

– Painting tips

– Informations about the materials

femalemannequinbustpatternplusguide.description_text:
This is a printable EVA foam pattern for a mannequin bust. Perfect for any cosplayer or maker!

You will receive:

- Easy, ready-to-print .PDF A4 and US letter 1:1 scale patterns of all parts

- A full guide with construction instructions and full colour images demonstrating the process

- Tools and materials list

- Information on printing, sizing etc.

The finished mannequin bust will have the following measurements:

- Bust: 86 cm

- Waist: 70 cm

- Hips: 87 cm

- Height: 68 cm

cosplaymakeuptipsandtricks.description_text: Cosplay Makeup Tips and Tricks starts from the basics, looking at some of the different kinds of makeup and tools. We will then show you some basic makeup applications for smooth foundation, eyeliner styles, eye shadow variations and even how to change the colour of your brows or completely cover them up! It also goes into some basics for body painting, creating your own fake tattoos and how to conceal your own tattoos completely! There’s also a section for contact lenses! Towards the end of the book there are 7 distinct character makeups, all representing different styles and techniques which can be used and applied to other characters! The Character makeups include anime makeup, natural makeup, glam makeup, body painting, scars and a stylised Borderlands makeup.

masculinearmorpatternset.description_text:
This pattern is for a full set of masculine armor which can be made from EVA foam! It includes pieces for the breastplate, shoulders, arms, hips, thighs, knees, legs and toes!

This set is a perfect starting point which you can add to and alter to create your armored costumes!

moldmakingandcasting.description_text:
In the second volume more methods on how to make your own horns, headpieces and various other things will be introduced. How to sculpt horns and how to create a silicone form will be explained in detail, followed by instructions on how you can then reproduce your masterpiece with casting resin any number of times. In addition of that, the materials and tools needed will be discussed, as well as the most important things you need to know when using these techniques.

– over 300 new pictures

– English and German

– Step by step tutorials

– Explanation: Different types of Silicone, Modelling Clay and Resin

– Modelling horns

– How to make a hollow cast

– 4 different types of silicone molds

faunbook.description_text:
This book teaches you everything about how to create hooves for your Faun costume. The hooves are the most critical part, because they can turn out very uncomfortable when you do it wrong. In the book are shown 4 different methods how to make hooves. Step by step tutorials make it easy to follow. Over 340 new pictures

– German and English

– Step by step tutorials

– Molding and Casting

– Making Worbla Hooves

– 4 different types of hoove shoes

bookofcosplaylightandsoundeffects_aguide.human_name: The Book of Cosplay Light & Sound Effects - A Guide for Beginners
bookofcosplaylightandsoundeffects_aguide.description_text: Getting started with animated LEDs, sound effects and programming has never been easier! Dive into the world of Circuit Python and learn on 48 pages and over 100 detailed pictures everything you need to know to let your costumes and props truly come to life! This super beginner friendly book will show you all materials you’ll need, teach you how to set up a reusable circuit and guide you trough an universal code that will help you add light effects, sounds, triggers and movement sensors! It is time to become the ultimate Cosplay Christmas tree! And the best: No programming knowledge is required!

cosplayconceptscompletecollection.description_text:
VOLUME ONE

'Cosplay Concepts' features over 70 original costume designs based on popular culture figures from various franchises, such as Disney, Sailor Moon, The Nightmare Before Christmas and more!

This 40 page book is printed in stunning full colour onto silk paper, bound in a soft cover. It includes:

  • Full body illustrations of costume designs
  • Artist's thoughts about their creation
  • Work in Progress sketches
  • A selection of back views, inspiration pictures and details of designs
  • Photos of cosplayers wearing costumes inspired by the designs

Book specifications:

44 pages, A4 portrait

------------------------------

VOLUME TWO

The much anticipated second volume in the Cosplay Concepts collection that showcases some of Hannah's latest costume designs from popular culture.

Every page is packed full of colour illustrations, progress sketches and detailed notes from the artist, which explore both the design process and how the illustrations are created. Alongside these insights are tips and tricks for designing and creating costumes, including a blank illustration template for you to use for your own creations.

Book specifications:

52 pages, A4 portrait

--------------------------------

VOLUME THREE

The most recent installment of the Cosplay Concepts series, launched November 2021! In keeping with the rest of the series, this book contains over 40 designs all with back views and design notes, as well as a look into Hannah's processes and inspirations.

Designs include Haku, Chihiro, Howl, Sophie, Link, Zelda, Yennefer, Triss, Ciri, the Crystal Gems, and many more!

Book specifications:

63 pages, A4 portrait

--------------------------------

SKETCHBOOK

In the spirit of Cosplay Concepts, Hannah created Cosplay Concepts: Sketchbook to showcase the complete collection of her design sketches in one handy compilation!

For years, Hannah has been creating sketches as part of her creative process before refining the ideas for the finished costume, often posting them online so her followers can input their thoughts, too. This book features a vast collection of her sketches so you can see her starting process in vivid detail.

ultimatebrushpack.description_text:
The Ultimate CLIP STUDIO PAINT (Manga Studio) & PHOTOSHOP Brush Pack is a professionally designed brush pack, created for use in CLIP STUDIO PAINT (Manga Studio) and PHOTOSHOP.

The Ultimate CLIP STUDIO PAINT (Manga Studio) & PHOTOSHOP Brush Pack is an amazing pack that includes a variety of brushes for everyone. Whether you're a digital artist, illustrator, comic artist, manga artist, professional or hobbyist, you will love this brush pack.

For your convenience, we have made these brushes available for both CLIP STUDIO PAINT (Manga Studio) & PHOTOSHOP. That way, you'll never miss a beat regardless of what application you're using.

There are 200 brushes in the Ultimate CLIP STUDIO PAINT (Manga Studio) & PHOTOSHOP Brush Pack. The Brush Pack includes 100 CLIP STUDIO PAINT (Manga Studio) brushes and 100 PHOTOSHOP brushes. The CLIP STUDIO PAINT (Manga Studio) brushes and PHOTOSHOP brushes are identical.

Get professional results on your terms in either CLIP STUDIO PAINT (Manga Studio) or PHOTOSHOP.

The Ultimate CLIP STUDIO PAINT (Manga Studio) & PHOTOSHOP Brush Pack Includes the following brushes:

- 5 cloud - Create your own dreamy horizon with these cloud brushes.

- 5 crowd - Save time and expedite your backgrounds with these crowd brushes.

- 5 spray - Create amazing textures with these spray brushes.

- 5 trees & grass - Maximize your drawing time with tree and grass brushes.

- 15 inking - Create amazing lines with these natural inking brushes.

- 15 painterly & watercolor & oil & bristle & acrylic & sponge - Realistic and natural brushes for everyone.

- 15 pastel & charcoal - Dry brushes for that organic look and feel.

- 15 penciling & sketching - Get started with you masterpiece with these natural brushes.

- 20 splatter - Add realism to any artwork.

***************************************************

** Installation Instructions ** 

***************************************************

CLIP STUDIO PAINT (Manga Studio) Brushes:

Please make sure you've installed CLIP STUDIO PAINT PRO or EX (Manga Studio 5 or 5 EX) on your computer.

Simply add the brushes (.sut files) to CLIP STUDIO PAINT (Manga Studio) via the Sub Tool Menu > Import Sub Tool

---------------------------------------------------

PHOTOSHOP Brushes:

Please make sure you've installed PHOTOSHOP on your computer.

Here are 2 ways that you can add brushes directly to PHOTOSHOP:

  1. Drag the brushes (.ABR files) directly into your PHOTOSHOP window

or

  1. Go to Edit > Presets > Preset Manager, select brushes from the dropdown menu, and then add your brushes using the "Load" button

***************************************************

** System Requirements **

***************************************************

CLIP STUDIO PAINT PRO (Manga Studio 5) or higher, CLIP STUDIO PAINT EX (Manga Studio 5 EX) or higher.

PHOTOSHOP CS 5 or higher (not tested on older versions of PHOTOSHOP)

Up to an additional 700 MB of free disk space recommended.

mohodebut125.description_text:
Moho™ Debut is your complete animation program for creating 2D movies, cartoons, stop motion or cut out animations. Create your own desktop animated shorts in the style of Disney Animation Studios, Nickelodeon Animation Studios, Cartoon Network Studios, South Park Studios or use it to produce animations for film, video, commercials or streaming over the web. Get started quickly with the Beginner’s Mode. Create your own custom characters using the built-in Character Wizard and convert your existing paper drawings to ready-to-animate vector images with one click. Draw your own artwork using built-in brushes, import digital photos, add sound and video, and choose from pre-designed characters or create your own and make them talk using integrated lip-synching. The revolutionary bone rigging system makes animating fast and an efficient alternative to tedious traditional animation.

Top Bullet Points:

  • Create your own cartoons and animations!
  • Bone-based Animation
  • Vector-based Animation
  • Cut out Animation
  • Simulate Stop Motion Animation

Key Features

Bone RiggingThe revolutionary bone rigging system makes animating fast and an efficient alternative to tedious frame-by-frame animation. You can easily add a skeleton to any image by simple point and click, and then bring it to life, and keep your project organized with the sequencer and timeline in Moho.

Enhanced Vector Based Drawing ToolsWith enhanced vector based drawing tools, including a variety of brush styles and the ability to import scanned drawings and images, you can create your own characters and objects in Moho Debut 12.

Character WizardThe built-in Character Wizard lets you quickly design your own characters complete with walk cycles. Creating your own animations has never been faster or easier.

Beginner’s ModeThe Beginner’s Mode guides you through using the key tools in Moho so you can start creating animated videos and shorts right away.

Auto-Freeze KeysWith Auto-Freeze Keys turned on, when you move a bone, all other bones in the rig will be keyed. This ensures body parts only move when intended. No more floating bones!

Content Library IncludedChoose from a library of content including ready-to-use characters, props, scenes, stock audio and video clips, scatter brushes and more.

Image VectorizerThe Image Vectorizer allows you to bring your existing sketches and image files to life by converting them to ready-to-animate vector drawings with the click of a button.

Integrated Audio RecordingThe integrated audio recording feature lets you record your own sound clips right within Moho and sync them to your animated characters using automatic lip-syncing.

Easier Lip SyncingIn version 12, Lip syncing and other frame by frame animations are even easier to achieve! All Switch Layers can be viewed and keyed with the Select Switch Window. Having a visual interface speeds up animation tasks!

New! Pin BonesWith Pin Bones add one point bones to alter, move and reshape assets in fun new ways. Combine with traditional bones for more complex animations. Works with both vectors and images!

donorschoose.description_text:
Payments to DonorsChoose are made via the PayPal Giving Fund.

Founded in 2000 by a Bronx history teacher, DonorsChoose has raised more than $510 million for America's classrooms. Teachers come to DonorsChoose to request the materials and experiences they need most for their classrooms, and donors give to the projects that inspire them. More than 2.5 million people and partners have funded 870,000 projects on the site, reaching 21 million students and making DonorsChoose the leading platform for supporting U.S. public schools. DonorsChoose is the only crowdfunding platform that vets each request, delivers materials directly to schools, and captures the impact of every funded project with photos, thank yous, and a cost report showing how each dollar was spent. Learn more at www.donorschoose.org.

*DonorsChoose was not involved in the selection of the content in this promotion and the views, opinions, and ideas expressed in the games are not endorsed by, and do not reflect or represent the views and opinions of DonorsChoose.
